hero_subtitle: SFTY unifies wallet activity, transaction risk, and destination-of-funds analysis into a single compliance workflow tailored for regulated digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Destination of funds lacks clear traceability
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to link wallet activity and transaction risk to final destinations across isolated systems. This slows destination-of-funds reviews and weakens the auditability of crypto transaction monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet activity, transaction risk signals and provider outputs into one workflow to help compliance teams trace destination-of-funds exposures with clear audit evidence and case context.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to destination review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet and transaction risk signals to structure destination-of-funds reviews, link cases and preserve evidence for compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY links wallet activity, transaction risk, and destination-of-funds data into structured reviews, cases, decisions, and evidence for clearer compliance control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs monitoring crypto destination flows with audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence integrated into controlled, enterprise-grade compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support destination of funds risk monitoring
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how destination of funds link to case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence captures wallet destination risk patterns
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for secure destination of funds review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY support destination of funds monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY aggregates destination-of-funds risk data, linking transactions, wallets and counterparties into structured alerts, reviews and cases for connected compliance oversight.
faq_2_question: How are destination of funds cases handled?
faq_2_answer: SFTY manages destination-of-funds cases by routing alerts into workflows with decision logs, evidence packaging and reviewer assignments for comprehensive case handling.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence by capturing decision records, case history and provider outputs to support defensible reviews and traceable compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYT and wallet providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects multiple KYT and wallet risk providers into one platform, enabling connected transaction monitoring and destination risk analysis across sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or blockchain providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or blockchain providers but integrates their outputs into actionable workflows, evidence, and reporting layers.
final_title: Connect destination-of-funds risk into compliance cases
final_description: Review how SFTY links wallet activity, transaction risk and destination-of-funds data into structured case workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
